name: Oracle Lens

active.effects: Consume one charge to summon a {{tip|Sweeper Drone}} that escorts you for the next 8 seconds, detecting nearby enemies that are not {{tip|sight|visible}} ({{pp|160 to 100|type=average champion level}} seconds recharge time; 2 charges; {{pp|600 to 750|type=level}} range).

effects_structured.raw: Consume one charge to summon a Sweeper Drone for 8 seconds that detects nearby units that are not visible.
Oracle Lens stores up to 2 charges and recharges from 160 to 100 seconds based on average champion level (affected by item haste).
While Oracle Lens is active, wards hit by your attacks are revealed to your team for 2 seconds.

simpleDescription: Disables nearby invisible wards and traps for a duration

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Oracle Lens is a charge-consuming active that follows the owner for 8 seconds; detection radius scales by owner level (600 to 750 range) and the cast itself is not target-locked.
Charge/cadence semantics: Oracle Lens stores 2 charges and recharges from 160 to 100 seconds based on average champion level, with trinket cooldown behavior affected by item haste.
Player-visible reveal branch: while active, attacking a ward briefly reveals that ward to the user's team for 2 seconds.
